title: Research and development (R&D) managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate marketing policies and programs, such as determining the demand for products and services offered by a firm and its competitors, and identify potential customers. Develop pricing strategies with the goal of maximizing the firm's profits or share of the market while ensuring the firm's customers are satisfied. Oversee product development or monitor trends that indicate the need for new products and services. Plan, direct, or coordinate the actual distribution or movement of a product or service to the customer. Coordinate sales distribution by establishing sales territories, quotas, and goals and establish training programs for sales representatives. Analyze sales statistics gathered by staff to determine sales potential and inventory requirements and monitor the preferences of customers. Plan, direct, or coordinate activities in such fields as architecture and engineering or research and development in these fields. (Based on 30 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Advise or assist in obtaining patents or meeting other legal requirements.
Confer with health care professionals to determine the best recruitment practices for studies and prepare study-related documentation.
Review proposed study protocols and evaluate factors like sample collection processes, data management plans, or potential subject risks.
Record adverse event and side effect data, confer with investigators regarding reporting of events, and ensure informed consent is properly obtained and documented.
Participate in the development of study protocols and instruct research staff in scientific and procedural aspects of studies.
Order necessary drugs or devices for study completion and organize space for study equipment and supplies.
Maintain contact with sponsors to coordinate site visits and respond to questions about issues like incomplete data.
Assess potential subjects' eligibility through methods such as screening interviews and reviews of medical records.
Schedule subjects for appointments, procedures, or inpatient stays as required by study protocols and track enrollment status of subjects.
Design or conduct applied biodiesel or biofuels research projects on various processes like fermentation and distillation.
Analyze data from biofuels studies and prepare reports for senior management or technical professionals.
Conduct experiments to test new or alternate feedstock fermentation processes and oversee biodiesel/biofuels prototyping or development projects.
Develop innovative technology in biofuels research and provide technical or scientific guidance to staff in biofuels development.
Prepare budgets, proposals, and reports for research studies, and conduct presentations at professional meetings.
Review scientific literature, participate in continuing education, and maintain current knowledge of clinical study affairs.
Determine scientific or technical goals within broad outlines provided by top management and develop plans to accomplish these goals.
Conduct quality assurance audits for studies, monitor activities for regulatory compliance, and manage the overall integration of technical activities.
Collaborate with investigators to prepare presentations or reports of clinical procedures, results, and conclusions.
Develop or implement policies, standards, and procedures for architectural or scientific work to ensure regulatory compliance.
Develop software applications or programming for statistical modeling and graphic analysis.
Review research literature and disseminate research by writing reports, publishing papers, or presenting at conferences.
Write proposals to win new projects and grant applications to secure funding for sustainability projects.
Determine whether statistical methods are appropriate based on user needs or research questions, and evaluate these methods for validity and accuracy.
Educate staff in the use of mathematical models and write training manuals for survey interviewers.
Present the results of mathematical modeling and data analysis to management or users, using charts, bullets, and graphs.
Negotiate terms and conditions of reinsurance with other companies and contracts with vendors to manage distribution strategies.
Report results of statistical analyses in peer-reviewed papers, technical manuals, and management reports defining problems and recommending solutions.
Analyze statistical information to estimate mortality, accident, sickness, disability, and retirement rates, as well as other environmental indicators.
Collaborate with programmers, senior managers, and decision-makers to develop plans for new lines of business or improvements to existing operations.
Prepare and structure data warehouses for storing data and define data requirements, gathering and validating information using statistical tests.
Design research projects applying valid scientific techniques and monitor customer preferences to inform sales focus.
Conduct surveys and collect data using various methods to identify potential markets and analyze findings for strategic improvements.
Direct staff in collecting and tabulating data, and monitor survey progress and performance using reports and calculations.
Prepare budgets and evaluate the financial aspects of product development, including return-on-investment and profit-loss projections.
Review existing plans for disaster recovery and business continuity, and conduct or oversee testing of these strategies.
Develop and implement sustainability project goals and assess sustainability initiatives based on effectiveness and feasibility.
Create marketing media to communicate sustainability issues and produce documentation of the data collection processes for surveys.
Conduct research to gather information about survey topics and collaborate with other researchers in planning and evaluation of surveys.
Develop or revise business plans for online business, emphasizing factors such as product line, pricing, inventory, or marketing strategy.
Create or maintain a database of customer accounts and manage orders or invoices using order management software.
Evaluate emerging trends in online retailing and incorporate new techniques, including marketing strategies and customer interface design.
Design security policies and procedures to ensure adequate security for transactions and customer information.
Review compliance with regulatory standards by preparing, submitting, and monitoring documentation and reports.
Investigate product complaints and develop strategies for the improvement of business or regulatory compliance processes.
Train staff in regulatory policies, customer service protocols, and security measures to maintain compliance and improve service quality.
Promote products using online advertising, social media, and other platforms to increase market visibility.
Determine pricing strategies, assess inventory requirements, and monitor sales statistics to maximize profits.
Analyze customer inquiries and purchase behaviors to optimize product listings and respond effectively to complaints.
Identify compliance issues that require follow-up or investigation and conduct or direct internal investigations.
Disseminate written policies and procedures related to compliance activities and provide employee training on compliance topics.
File appropriate compliance reports with regulatory agencies and maintain documentation of compliance activities.
Review loss prevention exception reports and investigate individuals suspected of theft to ensure adherence to guidelines.
Perform cash audits and deposit investigations to fully account for store cash and verify correct use of physical security systems.
Coordinate theft and fraud investigations and recommend improvements in loss prevention programs or training.
Advise retail establishments on developing loss-investigation procedures and train loss prevention staff on prevention measures.
Design environmental restoration studies and implement sustainable regeneration plans for brownfield sites to ensure compliance and safety.
Prepare reports to communicate brownfield redevelopment needs and coordinate on-site cleanup activities to ensure regulatory compliance.
Create project plans including scope, goals, resources, and schedule, while monitoring milestones and project staffing.
